sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE THGQMGACCOR ( CODACCOR INT NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_THGQMGACCOR PRIMARY KEY (CODACCOR) )
sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE THGQMGACCOR ( CODACCOR NUMBER(10) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_THGQMGACCOR PRIMARY KEY (CODACCOR) )

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo CODRNC na tabela THGQMGACCOR
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGACCOR ADD CODRNC INT

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo DTPRAZO na tabela THGQMGACCOR
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGACCOR ADD DTPRAZO DATETIME

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo DETALHEACAO na tabela THGQMGACCOR
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGACCOR ADD DETALHEACAO VARCHAR(4000)

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo NAOSEAPLICA na tabela THGQMGACCOR
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGACCOR ADD NAOSEAPLICA CHAR(1)

sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGACCOR ADD OQUE VARCHAR(500)

sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGACCOR ADD COMO VARCHAR(500)

sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGACCOR ADD ONDE VARCHAR(500)

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo PORQUE na tabela THGQMGACCOR
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGACCOR ADD PORQUE VARCHAR(500)

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo QUANDO na tabela THGQMGACCOR
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGACCOR ADD QUANDO DATETIME

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo QUANTO na tabela THGQMGACCOR
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGACCOR ADD QUANTO VARCHAR(200)

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo CODUSU na tabela THGQMGACCOR
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGACCOR ADD CODUSU INT

sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGACCOR ADD DHCREATE DATETIME
